metadata.name: Review Electronic Batch Record for Deviations

description: An agent must review a completed electronic batch record (eBR) for a batch of tablets, checking for any recorded deviations or out-of-specification results.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the eBR for the specified batch number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly pulls up the complete batch record.

nodes.task_description: Scan the eBR for any recorded deviation events.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a deviation logged for 'incorrect mixing time' in the granulation step.

nodes.task_description: Check the linked quality investigation report for the deviation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the investigation which concluded 'no impact on product quality'.

nodes.task_description: Forward the batch record to the Quality Assurance department for final approval and release.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully routes the eBR to the QA work queue.
